title: Car Trend?
content:
Do these cars look somewhat similar? Maybe this is the car design trend of 2007 ...

![](https://macsfvent.sgp1.cdn.digitaloceanspaces.com/media/2007/09/car_trend_01.jpg)

![](https://macsfvent.sgp1.cdn.digitaloceanspaces.com/media/2007/09/car_trend_02.jpg)

Or maybe I just like their look. :)

By the way, I like the look of the second car both front and side but I don't like any of the rear. However when it comes to the interior, CR-V all the way.
